riskReasons: Enemy hidden stats not confirmed: research, chief_gear, chief_charms, hero_gear, temporary_buffs, reinforcements.
City scout is useful, but research, gear, buffs, pets, and reinforcement changes may still be hidden.
Prediction confidence is reduced because invisible enemy strength can change the result.
advantages: Leader hero is explicitly selected, so hero scoring can be more reliable.
recommendations: Do not solo with this setup; use rally support or change target.
Collect profile screenshots or previous battle reports before committing important troops.
Test infantry-heavy and burst variants; compare outcome bands before attacking.
